# The full-stack quantum platform
IonQ, the only full-stack quantum platform, is solving the world’s most complex problems with products and services spanning across quantum compute, quantum networking, quantum sensing, quantum security, and quantum space infrastructure. 
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/693b0139e2c898f5051fe091_Dan%20Sheredy_Assembly.avif)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/69165945455270fade96c22a_image%2015%20\(1\).avif)
![Quantum networking](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/693b09769c08cfa4bb38dd91_IonQ_DataCenter_FullHD_20250410_B.00_00_16_06.Still006.avif)
## Quantum networking
IonQ is at the forefront of quantum networking to secure communications and protect critical data from current and future threats.
[Read the announcement](https://www.ionq.com/news/ionq-announces-usd22m-deal-with-epb-establishing-chattanooga-tennessee-as)
## Quantum security
Quantum key distribution (QKD) is used to secure communications and build the foundation of a global quantum internet.
[Read the announcement](https://www.ionq.com/news/ionq-completes-acquisition-of-id-quantique-cementing-leadership-in-quantum)[Visit ID Quantique](https://www.idquantique.com/)
[Explore open positions](https://www.idquantique.com/about-idq/careers/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/6940351c0d8d7098e7dc978e_02.avif)
![Iodine Spectrometer](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/693b0403665b5e5e194d3e0d_Iodine%20Spectrometer.avif)
## Quantum sensing
IonQ's sensing products will transform industries from transportation to telecom. By harnessing the extreme stability of atoms, our clocks and sensors deliver performance for tomorrow's world.
[Read the announcement](https://www.ionq.com/news/ionq-completes-acquisition-of-vector-atomic-the-global-leader-in-advanced)[Visit Vector Atomic](https://vectoratomic.com/)
[Explore open positions](https://apply.workable.com/vectoratomic/)
## Quantum-enabled space infrastructure
Built for speed, accuracy, and reliability, we deliver Earth-observation infrastructure engineered to support quantum-secure communications, protected networks, and precision data transfer, safeguarding critical intelligence for government and allied operators requiring high-fidelity ISR.
[Read the announcement](https://www.ionq.com/news/ionq-completes-acquisition-of-capella-space-advancing-vision-for-space-based)[Visit Capella Space](https://www.capellaspace.com/)
[Explore open positions](https://www.capellaspace.com/company/careers)
![Quantum space infrastructure](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/693b055a72a429563828b83d_CAPELLA_C10_SP_GEC_HH_20230908085326_20230908085352_rotated_4096%201%20\(2\).avif)
[![IONQ Logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68836cf9cff21bf9efa61419/68d5c880925ae014ff5984d5_Group%20\(1\).svg)](https://www.ionq.com/)

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
      var navRoot = document.querySelector('.navigation');
      var navBg = document.querySelector('.nav-dd-list-bg');
      var navOverlay = document.querySelector('.nav-close-overlay');
      var navDropdowns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown.w-dropdown'));

      var navOverlayDelayTimeout = null;
      var navIsSwitching = false;
      var navOverlayIsVisible = false;

      function navGetListAndInner(navDropdown) {
        var navList = navDropdown.querySelector('.w-dropdown-list');
        if (!navList) return { list: null, inner: null };
        var navInner = navList.firstElementChild || navList;
        return { list: navList, inner: navInner };
      }

      function navAnyOpen() {
        return navDropdowns.some(function(navDD) {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          return pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open');
        });
      }

      function navShowOverlayImmediate() {
        if (!navOverlay) return;
        if (navOverlayIsVisible) return;
        navOverlayIsVisible = true;
        navOverlay.style.display = "block";
        navOverlay.style.opacity = "0";
        requestAnimationFrame(function() {
          navOverlay.style.transition = "opacity 250ms ease";
          navOverlay.style.opacity = "1";
        });
      }

      function navHideOverlayImmediate() {
        if (!navOverlay) return;
        navOverlay.style.transition = "opacity 250ms ease";
        navOverlay.style.opacity = "0";
        setTimeout(function() {
          navOverlay.style.display = "none";
          navOverlayIsVisible = false;
        }, 250);
      }

      function navUpdateOverlay(triggeredFromClick) {
        clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
        var openExists = navAnyOpen();

        if (!openExists) {
          if (navIsSwitching) {
            navOverlayDelayTimeout = setTimeout(function() {
              if (!navAnyOpen()) {
                navHideOverlayImmediate();
                if (navRoot) {
                  navRoot.classList.remove('open');
                }
                navIsSwitching = false;
              }
            }, 170);
          } else {
            navHideOverlayImmediate();
            if (navRoot) {
              navRoot.classList.remove('open');
            }
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
          return;
        }

        navIsSwitching = false;

        if (navRoot) {
          navRoot.classList.add('open');
        }

        if (triggeredFromClick === true) {
          navShowOverlayImmediate();
        }
      }

      function navUpdateBgHeight() {
        var navOpen = null;

        navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          if (pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open')) {
            navOpen = pair;
          }
        });

        if (!navOpen) {
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          navUpdateOverlay(false);
          return;
        }

        var h1 = navOpen.inner.scrollHeight;
        var h2 = navRoot ? navRoot.offsetHeight || 0 : 0;
        if (navBg) {
          navBg.style.height = (h1 + h2) + 'px';
        }
        navUpdateOverlay(true);
      }

      navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
        var navToggle = navDD.querySelector('.w-dropdown-toggle');
        if (!navToggle) return;

        navToggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          var anyOpenNow = navAnyOpen();
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          var thisIsOpen = pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains('w--open');
          if (anyOpenNow && !thisIsOpen) {
            navIsSwitching = true;
          } else {
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
        });

        $(window).on("scroll", function () {
          var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
          if (pair.list && pair.list.classList.contains("w--open")) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
            if (navBg) {
              navBg.style.height = '0px';
            }
            clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
            navHideOverlayImmediate();
            if (navRoot) {
              navRoot.classList.remove('open');
            }
            navIsSwitching = false;
          }
        });
      });

      navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
        var pair = navGetListAndInner(navDD);
        if (!pair.list) return;

        var observer = new MutationObserver(function() {
          navUpdateBgHeight();
        });

        observer.observe(pair.list, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class', 'style'] });
      });

      if (navOverlay) {
        navOverlay.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
          });
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
          navHideOverlayImmediate();
          if (navRoot) {
            navRoot.classList.remove('open');
          }
          navIsSwitching = false;
        });
      }

      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!navAnyOpen()) return;
        if (!e.target.closest('.nav-dropdown')) {
          navDropdowns.forEach(function(navDD) {
            $(navDD).trigger('w-close.w-dropdown');
          });
          if (navBg) {
            navBg.style.height = '0px';
          }
          clearTimeout(navOverlayDelayTimeout);
          navHideOverlayImmediate();
          if (navRoot) {
            navRoot.classList.remove('open');
          }
          navIsSwitching = false;
        }
      });

    });
  }
</script>

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const COOKIE_PREFIX = "__Secure-Session-US-Web";
  const COOKIE_DOMAIN = ".ionq.com";

  function getCookieByPrefix(prefix) {
    const row = document.cookie
      .split(";")
      .map(r => r.trim())
      .find(r => r.startsWith(prefix));
    return row ? decodeURIComponent(row.split("=")[1]) : null;
  }

  function getCookieNameByPrefix(prefix) {
    const row = document.cookie
      .split(";")
      .map(r => r.trim())
      .find(r => r.startsWith(prefix));
    return row ? row.split("=")[0] : null;
  }

  function deleteIonqSessionCookie() {
    const actualCookieName = getCookieNameByPrefix(COOKIE_PREFIX);
    if (!actualCookieName) return;

    document.cookie =
      actualCookieName +
      "=; Domain=" +
      COOKIE_DOMAIN +
      "; Path=/; Max-Age=0; Secure; SameSite=None";
  }

  async function isIonqUserLoggedIn() {
    const token = getCookieByPrefix(COOKIE_PREFIX);
    if (!token) return false;

    try {
      const res = await fetch("https://api.ionq.co/v0.3/users/me", {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` }
      });

      if (res.status !== 200) return false;

      const user = await res.json();
      return !!(user && user.confirmed === true);
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function applyAuthVisibility(isLoggedIn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('[auth="off"]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.setProperty("display", isLoggedIn ? "none" : "flex", "important");
    });

    document.querySelectorAll('[auth="on"]').forEach(el => {
      el.style.setProperty("display", isLoggedIn ? "flex" : "none", "important");
    });
  }

  const signOutBtn = document.querySelector('[auth-btn="sign-out"]');
  if (signOutBtn) {
    signOutBtn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      deleteIonqSessionCookie();
      applyAuthVisibility(false);
    });
  }

  isIonqUserLoggedIn().then(isLoggedIn => {
    applyAuthVisibility(isLoggedIn);
  });
});

</svg></div></a></div></div></div><div class="hidden-js w-embed w-script"><script>
  // --------------------------------------------------------------------
  // MAIN SCRIPT
  // --------------------------------------------------------------------

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {


    // ####################################
    /**
 * Minimalni JSONP helper – isti princip kao u testMailchimp snippetu.
 * url: baza URL-a (može već da sadrži query parametre)
 * callbackParamName: npr. "c" za Mailchimp
 * cb: function (err, data)
 */
    function jsonp(url, callbackParamName, cb) {
      const callbackName =
            "mcJsonpCallback_" + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10);

      const script = document.createElement("script");

      const separator = url.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
      script.src = url + separator + callbackParamName + "=" + callbackName;

      window[callbackName] = function (data) {
        try {
          cb(null, data);
        } finally {
          delete window[callbackName];
          script.remove();
        }
      };

      script.onerror = function (err) {
        try {
          cb(err || new Error("JSONP network error"));
        } finally {
          delete window[callbackName];
          script.remove();
        }
      };

      document.body.appendChild(script);
    }

    /**
 * Šalje podatke iz forme ka Mailchimpu preko JSONP-a.
 * Očekuje:
 *  - <form mailchimp-url="...">
 *  - inpute sa [data-mailchimp="EMAIL"], [data-mailchimp="NAME"], itd.
 *
 * @param {HTMLFormElement} form
 * @returns {Promise<any>}  // resolve(data) iz Mailchimp-a
 */
    function sendMailchimpFromForm(form) {
      if (!form) {
        return Promise.reject(new Error("Form element nije prosleđen."));
      }

      const mailchimpURL = form.getAttribute("mailchimp-url");
      if (!mailchimpURL) {
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error('Form nema "mailchimp-url" atribut.')
        );
      }

      // Skupi sve fieldove koji imaju data-mailchimp atribut
      const fields = form.querySelectorAll("[data-mailchimp]");

      if (!fields.length) {
        console.error(
          "❌ Form nema nijedan element sa [data-mailchimp] atributom.",
          form
        );
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error("Form nema nijedan [data-mailchimp] field.")
        );
      }

      // Napravi params objekat iz fieldova
      const params = {};
      fields.forEach((field) => {
        const key = field.getAttribute("data-mailchimp"); // npr. "EMAIL", "NAME"
        if (!key) return;

        const value =
              field.value != null
        ? field.value
        : field.getAttribute("value") || "";

        params[key] = value;
      });

      console.log("📝 Mailchimp params iz forme:", params);

      // Umesto toQueryString – koristimo URLSearchParams direktno
      const searchParams = new URLSearchParams();
      Object.keys(params).forEach((key) => {
        const val = params[key];
        if (val != null && val !== "") {
          searchParams.append(key, val);
        }
      });

      const queryString = searchParams.toString();
      if (!queryString) {
        console.error("❌ Query string je prazan iako postoje fieldovi.");
        return Promise.reject(
          new Error("Nema nijednog validnog data-mailchimp parametra.")
        );
      }

      // mailchimpURL već treba da sadrži ?u=...&id=...
      const separator = mailchimpURL.includes("?") ? "&" : "?";
      const requestUrl = mailchimpURL + separator + queryString;

      console.log("🌐 Mailchimp request URL:", requestUrl);

      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        jsonp(
          requestUrl,
          "c", // Mailchimp callback param, kao u prvom snippetu
          (err, data) => {
            if (err) {
              console.error("Mailchimp JSONP error:", err);
              reject(err);
            } else {
              // console.log("Mailchimp response:", data);
              resolve(data);
            }
          }
        );
      });
    }

    //######################################

    const DEBUG_MODE = true;

    function log(message, data) {
      if (DEBUG_MODE) console.log(message, data || "");
    }

    // --- UTILS ---

    function getGoogleAnalyticsClientId() {
      try {
        const match = document.cookie.match(/_ga=GA1\.1\.(\d+\.\d+)/);
        return match ? match[1] : null;
      } catch (e) {
        return null;
      }
    }

    function getReferrerIds(queryString) {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(queryString);
      const keys = [
        "utm_source",
        "utm_medium",
        "utm_campaign",
        "utm_content",
        "utm_term",
        "gclid",
        "fbclid",
        "msclkid",
        "li_fat_id"
      ];
      const result = {};
      keys.forEach((key) => {
        if (params.has(key)) result[key] = params.get(key);
      });
      return result;
    }

    // --- INTEGRACIJA SA formState (validation handler) ---

    const trackedForms = document.querySelectorAll('form[data-tracker="true"]');

    // Ako formState ne postoji (validation skripta nije učitana) → ne radimo ništa
    if (typeof formState === "undefined") {
      log("[Segment handler] formState nije definisan, preskačem registraciju onComplete handlera.");
    } else {
      trackedForms.forEach((form) => {
        const func = () => {
          // code
          handleFormSubmit(form);
          //############################
          //funkcija za mailchimp
          const mailchimpUrl = form.getAttribute("mailchimp-url");
          if (mailchimpUrl && mailchimpUrl.trim() !== "") {
            sendMailchimpFromForm(form)
              .then((data) => {
              console.log("✅ Mailchimp response:", data);
            })
              .catch((err) => {
              console.error("❌ Greška pri slanju ka Mailchimpu:", err);
            });
          }
          // ###########################
        };
        // email-form-1 == form ID
        formState[form.id] = {
          onComplete: func
        };
        log("[Segment handler] Registered formState handler for:", form.id);
      });
    }

    // --- GLAVNA LOGIKA ---

    function handleFormSubmit(form) {
      log("Form submit detected. Processing...", form);

      const segmentIdentify = {};
      const segmentTrack = {};

      const gaId = getGoogleAnalyticsClientId();
      const formNameAttr = form.getAttribute("data-form-name");
      const formMode = form.getAttribute("data-form-mode") || "track";
      const urlMode = form.getAttribute("data-url-mode") || "track";
      const eventName =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-event") || "Form Submit";

      const minimalSegment =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-minimal") === "true";
      const shouldIdentify =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-identify") !== "false";

      const disableFormUrl =
            form.getAttribute("data-segment-url") === "disabled";

      const inputs = form.querySelectorAll("input, select, textarea");

      inputs.forEach((input) => {
        // 0) Globalni skip + submit dugmad
        if (
          input.type === "submit" ||
          input.getAttribute("data-skip") === "true"
        )
          return;

        // 1) vrednost (posebno za checkbox/radio)
        let value = input.value;

        const segmentOverride = input.getAttribute("data-segment-value");
        if (segmentOverride !== null) {
          value = segmentOverride;
        }

        if (input.type === "checkbox" || input.type === "radio") {
          if (!input.checked) return; // ne šaljemo unchecked
          if (segmentOverride === null) {
            value = input.value || true;
          }
        }
        if (value == null || value === "") return;

        const rawName = input.name || input.id || "unknown_field";

        // SEGMENT kontrola
        const segmentMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "both";
        const segmentKey =
              input.getAttribute("data-segment-key") || rawName;

        // 2) Specijalni slučajevi – PRE generičke logike
        const identity = input.getAttribute("data-identity");
        const isEmail = identity === "email" || input.type === "email";

        // 2.1 Marketing consent
        if (input.getAttribute("data-consent") === "marketing") {
          segmentIdentify["marketing_contact"] = "Marketing contact";
          return;
        }

        // 2.2 Full name
        if (identity === "full_name") {
          const parts = value.trim().split(/\s+/);
          const fName = parts.shift() || "";
          const lName = parts.join(" ");

          const fullNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (fullNameMode !== "none") {
            if (fullNameMode === "identify" || fullNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["first_name"] = fName;
              if (lName) {
                segmentIdentify["last_name"] = lName;
              }
            }
            if (fullNameMode === "track" || fullNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["first_name"] = fName;
              if (lName) {
                segmentTrack["last_name"] = lName;
              }
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.3 Email
        if (isEmail) {
          const emailMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (emailMode !== "none") {
            if (emailMode === "identify" || emailMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["email"] = value;
            }
            if (emailMode === "track" || emailMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["email"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.4 First name
        if (identity === "first_name") {
          const firstNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (firstNameMode !== "none") {
            if (firstNameMode === "identify" || firstNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["first_name"] = value;
            }
            if (firstNameMode === "track" || firstNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["first_name"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 2.5 Last name
        if (identity === "last_name") {
          const lastNameMode = input.getAttribute("data-segment-mode") || "identify";
          if (lastNameMode !== "none") {
            if (lastNameMode === "identify" || lastNameMode === "both") {
              segmentIdentify["last_name"] = value;
            }
            if (lastNameMode === "track" || lastNameMode === "both") {
              segmentTrack["last_name"] = value;
            }
          }
          return;
        }

        // 3) GENERIČKA Segment logika
        if (segmentMode !== "none") {
          if (segmentMode === "track" || segmentMode === "both") {
            segmentTrack[segmentKey] = value;
          }
          if (segmentMode === "identify" || segmentMode === "both") {
            segmentIdentify[segmentKey] = value;
          }
        }
      });

      // --- METADATA + REFERRER ---

      const metadata = {
        GA4_client_ID: gaId
      };

      if (formNameAttr) {
        metadata.form_name = formNameAttr;
      }

      if (!disableFormUrl) {
        metadata.form_url = window.location.href;
      }

      const referrerData = getReferrerIds(window.location.search);

      // --- SEGMENT ---

      if (window.analytics) {
        let finalTrack = { ...metadata, ...segmentTrack };

        // IonQ-style minimal event → samo meta
        if (minimalSegment) {
          finalTrack = { ...metadata };
        }

        const categoryAttr = form.getAttribute("data-segment-category");
        if (categoryAttr) {
          finalTrack.category = categoryAttr;
        }

        const labelAttr = form.getAttribute("data-segment-label");
        if (labelAttr) {
          finalTrack.label = labelAttr;
        }

        if (formMode === "identify") {
          delete finalTrack.form_name;
        }
        if (urlMode === "identify") {
          delete finalTrack.form_url;
        }

        log("[Segment] Track:", finalTrack);
        window.analytics.track(eventName, finalTrack);

        if (shouldIdentify && segmentIdentify.email) {
          const finalIdentify = {
            ...metadata,
            ...referrerData,
            ...segmentIdentify
          };

          if (formMode === "track") {
            delete finalIdentify.form_name;
          }
          if (urlMode === "track") {
            delete finalIdentify.form_url;
          }

          log("[Segment] Identify:", finalIdentify);
          window.analytics.identify(finalIdentify);
        }
      }
    }

  });
</script></div><div class="hidden-css w-embed"><style>

    $('[scroll="enable"]').on('click', function () {
        if ($body.css('overflow') != 'hidden') { scrollPosition = window.pageYOffset; }
        $body.css('overflow', '');
        $body.css('position', '');
        $body.css('top', '');
        $body.width('');
        $(window).scrollTop(scrollPosition);
    });
    $('[scroll="both"]').on('click', function () {
        if ($body.css('overflow') !== 'hidden') {
            var oldWidth = $body.innerWidth();
            scrollPosition = window.pageYOffset;
            $body.css('overflow', 'hidden');
            $body.css('position', 'fixed');
            $body.css('top', `-${scrollPosition}px`);
            $body.width(oldWidth);
        } else {
            $body.css('overflow', '');
            $body.css('position', '');
            $body.css('top', '');
            $body.width('');
            $(window).scrollTop(scrollPosition);
        }
    });
});
</script>
